This is the most pointless thing ever. I’m going to go get a job to pay for this. Oh yeah, that’s what this is for.

I can't even get in the website to make an account for this game. I will like u to respond and tell me what I should do. Unless u can get rid of login.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for letting us know about the trouble you’re having! Mind sharing a bit more detail about what’s going on here?

Please go to this URL- https://workwindow.atlassian.net/servicedesk/customer/portal/3/create/42 to submit a quick ticket. We’d really appreciate it—once we know the specifics, we’ll do our best to help you get in and start using the simulator!

Thanks again for reaching out. We’re here if you need anything else!

reviews.review_description: It should be free, why do I need an account? I really want this to be free, I need to practice my skills, could I have a  free login?

developer_response.body:
Hey, thanks for your feedback!

The Job Interview Simulator is a one-time purchase that helps you practice for real-world interviews with an interactive, easy-to-use setup. The small cost helps us keep the app running smoothly and up-to-date.

As for needing an account, it’s just so you can access everything properly—nothing complicated, and we don’t collect any personal stuff beyond what’s needed.

We hope you’ll give it a try and find it super helpful! Let us know if you have any other questions.

reviews.review_description:
Just bad you need to sign 
￼In like what ￼

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback!

We ask users to sign in to ensure secure and reliable access to the app. It’s a quick step, and we don’t ask for anything unnecessary—just enough to get you up and running.

We’d love for you to give the app a proper try!
